programme.title: Limitless
programme.desc: Facing unemployment and his girlfriend's rejection, writer Eddie Morra is sure that he has no future. That all changes when an old friend gives him a drug that produces enhanced mental acuity. Stoked on the untested chemical, Eddie rises to the top of the financial world and attracts the attention of a tycoon who intends to use him to make a fortune. But terrible side effects and a dwindling supply threaten to collapse Eddie's house of cards.

programme.title: Blitz
programme.desc: Jason Statham stars as a tough cop who's dispatched to take down a serial killer who has been targeting police officers. Also featuring Paddy Considine and Aidan Gillen.

programme.title: Are You Here

programme.title: Maximum Risk

programme.title: The Bitter Tea Of General Yen
programme.desc: The idealistic fiancée of an American missionary becomes enmeshed in a plot to overthrow a powerful Chinese warlord.

programme.desc: A inept schemer hatches a wild plan to raise enough money to convert a swinging Chinese discotheque back into his wife's ancestral home.

programme.title: You Were Never Lovelier
programme.desc: Love story and musical set in Latin America.

programme.title: 10th And Wolf
programme.desc: A former street tough returns to his Philadelphia home after a stint in the military. Back on his home turf, he once again finds himself tangling with the mob boss who was instrumental in his going off to be a soldier.

programme.title: Insomnia
programme.desc: In a Norwegian city with a 24-hour daylight cycle a Swedish murder investigator has been brought in on a special case. Sleep deprived, he makes a horrible mistake which is discovered by the killer he has been hunting.

programme.title: Winter Kills
programme.desc: The younger brother of an assassinated US President is led down a rabbit hole of conspiracies and dead ends after learning of a man claiming to be the real shooter.

programme.title: Today You Die
programme.desc: A former thief who is trying to go straight seeks vengeance on those who framed him.

programme.title: Crank

programme.desc: In a chase through Los Angeles, Chev pursues a Chinese mobster who has stolen his nearly indestructible heart.

programme.title: Guns Akimbo
programme.desc: A guy relies on his newly acquired gladiator skills to save his ex-girlfriend from kidnappers.

programme.title: Dredd

programme.title: The Spirit

programme.title: Her Deadly Game
programme.desc: When her childhood friend Kayla transfers to her college basketball team, Andrea's reunion turns into a nightmare. Kayla, obsessed with being Andrea's one and only best friend, will harm anyone who gets in her way.

programme.title: Best Man Dead Man
programme.desc: A bachelor party in the middle of nowhere quickly turns into a night of murder and mystery when the best man ends up with a knife in his head. Everyone is a suspect; only an eccentric private eye in town can solve the mystery.

programme.title: 12 To Midnight
programme.desc: A detective gets kicked off the force when the murder of his wife drives him to drink. When a new string of murders seem connected to her death, he soon finds himself squaring off against a killer who appears to be superhuman.

programme.title: Lone Star Shark 2
programme.desc: A new victim has been chosen to face off against a ravenous shark in a Texas lake.

programme.title: Andromeda: 1883
programme.desc: Space marine Casey Reynolds travels into the past to stop a killer android bent on wiping out the one person crucial to saving the human race.

programme.title: Samurai Marathon
programme.desc: A spy has to win a race to prevent a shogunate from wrecking an alliance.

programme.title: Shocking Kung Fu of Huo's
programme.desc: Huo Zhenshan opens a school to promote Chinese martial arts 20 years after the Revolution of 1911.

programme.title: Railroad Tigers
programme.desc: A railroad worker and his ragtag group of freedom fighters find themselves on the wrong side of the tracks when they decide to ambush a heavily armed military train filled with desperately needed provisions. Unarmed and outnumbered, they must rely on their wits to battle an entire army.

programme.title: Fist of Legend
programme.desc: Chinese martial arts student Chen Zhen is studying in Kyoto, Japan, when he learns his mentor has died in a match against Ryuichi Akutagawa. Returning home to the Japanese-occupied Shanghai of 1937, Chen challenges Ryuichi to a fight and easily defeats him. Concluding his master was set up, Chen has an autopsy performed. Meanwhile, word of his martial arts skill entices new students hoping to study with him, making his teacher's son, Huo Ting-An, jealous.

programme.title: Operation Mekong
programme.desc: Members of an international task force seek justice against the leader of an Asian drug cartel and his murderous henchmen.

programme.title: Envy: A Seven Deadly Sins Story
programme.desc: Gabrielle is delighted that she has a half-sister, Keisha. But Keisha wants more.

programme.desc: Dana and Curtis' daughter, Alicia, sneaks out of the house and goes missing.

programme.title: My Life is a Lifetime Movie
programme.desc: For seven years Christine Carter and Nicholas Francisco had the perfect marriage.

programme.title: Framed By My Sister
programme.desc: Twins Reina and Alex find their lives upended by their mysterious triplet.

programme.title: Envy: A Seven Deadly Sins Story
programme.desc: Gabrielle is delighted that she has a half-sister, Keisha. But Keisha wants more.

programme.title: Buying Back My Daughter
programme.desc: Dana and Curtis' daughter, Alicia, sneaks out of the house and goes missing.

programme.title: Best Friend From Heaven
programme.desc: When her dog is killed, Tara cancels her wedding. But her dog's ghost and her small town have a surprise.

programme.title: Inspiring Love
programme.desc: When Isla’s art unexpectedly sells to Mark, a second commission sees them falling in love.

programme.title: Campus Caller
programme.desc: When a university student goes missing, her mother a former cop goes in search for her.

programme.title: Snowman's Pass
programme.desc: Impresario aids fiancée in search for her fallen climber, masking his true goal: finding a spy satellite.

programme.title: The Suspect
programme.desc: Beth is wrongly accused of murdering her husband, Paul. Even her step-daughter does not believe her.

programme.title: Take Back
programme.desc: Zara (Gillian White) and Brian (Michael Jai White) are living the perfect small town life when a mysterious stranger from Zara's secret past kidnaps their daughter and now they must race to save her life.

programme.title: I'm In Love With A Church Girl
programme.desc: A reformed drug trafficker finds unexpected love with a woman guided by strong faith, testing his resolve to leave his criminal past behind.

programme.title: The Challenger
programme.desc: The Challenger follows the life struggles of a young, Bronx auto mechanic, Jaden Miller. When Jaden and his mother are evicted from their home, he soon finds that boxing may be the key to stop them from living on the streets and the ticket to a better life. With legendary trainer, Duane Taylor, Miller becomes a local hero and captures the attention of a cable network that decides to create a reality show around his goal to fight to the Light-Heavyweight Title.

programme.title: Edison
programme.desc: Ambitious young reporter Pollack (Justin Timberlake) suspects insidious corruption in his town's elite police unit, known as F.R.A.T., and finds a friendly source in Deed (LL Cool J), a dissatisfied member of the squad. With Deed's information and the backing of his publisher, Ashford (Morgan Freeman), and a crusading lawyer, Wallace (Kevin Spacey), Pollack infiltrates the secretive police cabal. He finds himself in over his head, however, when he discovers the true extent of the criminality.

programme.title: The Climb
programme.desc: The breath-taking story of two men ... one with a courageous heart who seeks God; the other with an independent spirit who relies on his own strength.

programme.title: Lines of Allegiance
programme.desc: After running a criminal enterprise for years, Professa feels it’s time for a change. When he’s set up by someone in his crew, he’s arrested and sent out of Macon, GA per the judge’s order. But when tragedy forces him to return, he finds the people he once cared for, have their own intentions for themselves.

programme.title: Born Again Baddie
programme.desc: Following a tragic car accident that claimed her mother’s life and left her father paralyzed, Nia is desperate and forced into a life of crime. After expanding her business and becoming the queen pin of the city, tragedy strikes and it forces her to find solace and reflection on her past life choices.

programme.title: The One That Got Away
programme.desc: Blake, a man on the verge of marriage who becomes ensnared in a dangerous game of deception and revenge orchestrated by his vengeful ex, London. As their past resurfaces, he is forced to confront hidden secrets and navigate London's sinister manipulations, leading to explosive confrontations and heart-pounding suspense.

programme.title: Legends of the Highway
programme.desc: Follow the true story of the Florida Highwaymen, 26 self-taught African American artists who forged their own path to success in the segregated 1950’s and 60’s. Their stories are guided by the mentorship of renowned landscape painters A.E. Backus, Alfred Hair, and Harold Newton. Their troupe captured Florida’s breathtaking landscapes and sold their paintings along state highways, circumventing the traditional art world that excluded them.

programme.title: Planet Dune
programme.desc: A rescue mission on a desert planet turns deadly when they find the planet’s apex predators: giant sandworms.

programme.title: Dragon
programme.desc: A princess must recruit the most brave and powerful swordsmen to vanquish a dark wizard and his dragon.

programme.title: Dragonquest
programme.desc: A young hero must awaken a dragon to battle a legendary creature summoned by a warlord.

programme.title: Disaster Strike Force
programme.desc: Plummeting temperatures signify the dawn of a new Ice Age.

programme.title: 100 Million BC
programme.desc: Time-traveling scientists inadvertently bring a giant carnivorous dinosaur back to modern Los Angeles.

programme.title: The Terminators
programme.desc: A small band of resistance fighters battle the cyborgs that have taken control of the planet.

programme.title: Patrick (Edited Version)
programme.desc: Placeholder

programme.title: Under the Bed (Edited Version)
programme.desc: Neal has been living with his aunt following the death of his mother, and it is implied that he attempted to burn their house down. He has just returned to live with his father and new stepmother Angela, and younger brother Paulie. Although everyone seems to welcome him back, his father is very hostile, and the neighborhood kids believe that Neal is crazy. Neal speaks to Paulie about the true cause of their mother's death, revealed to be a monster that lives under their bed and is only repelled by light. The monster has begun to torment Paulie as it did to Neal, and the brothers must formulate a plan to destroy it once and for all.

programme.title: The Dead Outside (Edited Version)
programme.desc: A neurological pandemic has consumed the population. April, a secretive young girl, and Daniel, a man desperate and bereaved, come together on an isolated farm. When a mysterious stranger turns up, they are confronted with a new enemy even deadlier than the one beyond the perimeter.

programme.title: Red Scorpion
programme.desc: A Soviet Special Forces soldier is sent on a mission to infiltrate an African rebel army and assassinate its leader, but the war machine they trained starts to think for himself.

programme.title: Infested
programme.desc: Facing an invasion of venomous spiders, residents of a suburb building will have to find their way out to survive.

programme.title: Skinamarink
programme.desc: Two children wake up in the middle of the night to find their father is missing, and all the windows and doors in their home have vanished.

programme.title: Brooklyn 45
programme.desc: Five military veterans, best friends since childhood, gather together to support their troubled host, and the metaphoric ghosts of their past become all-too-literal.

programme.title: You'll Never Find Me
programme.desc: An isolated man living in the back of a desolate caravan park is visited by a desperate young woman seeking shelter from a violent storm.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Jed Gets the Misery" - Jed cheers up Granny by pretending to be sick so she can doctor him. Soon Drysdale and his doctor, Clyburn, are subject to her methods as well.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jethro brings home a friend, Armstrong Dueser McHugh III, who is coddled by a chauffeur who treats him as frail. The Clampetts know better, and show him a good time, friendship and family.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: When Miss Hathaway gets sick and Mr. Drysdale has to speak at a conference, Jed helps out by running the bank and having Elly be his secretary, while Jethro finds a speech that Drysdale accidentally uses instead of his own. All the while a new teller sucks-up to the men and flirts with the women.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "The Psychiatrist Gets Clampetted" - Jethro finally gets his bill of health from Dr. Twombly so he can graduate the fifth grade, but Twombly really wants to talk to Grannie again. Drysdale brings him to the Clampetts' just as Grannie showed Pearl how to use a love potion, so everyone thinks Twombly's interest in Grannie is love.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "The Clampetts Get Psychoanalyzed" - Jethro needs a health certificate to graduate from the fifth grade, so he goes to the only doctor the Clampetts know about - Mrs. Drysdale's psychiatrist. He gets nowhere with Jethro, so Pearl comes and she thinks he is testing her virtue when he tries to lay her on his couch.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "The Clampetts in Court" - When a couple who ran into the Clampett's car discover that they're rich, they fake injuries and sue the Clampetts.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "The Clampetts Entertain" - Jed arranges a party to get Grannie out of her doldrums and invites the Drysdale. But when Mr. Drysdale's boss comes and wants to meet them for dinner, he wonders if he's going to be sent to an Alaskan bank when his boss finds out he's been lying about Jed and his family being sophisticated.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Duke Becomes a Father" - Mlle. Denise comes back for the birth of her dog's puppies, and to see Jed. They do some "courtin' and sparkin'" Mrs. Drysdale isn't nearly so happy when she finds the puppies share more in common with Duke the bloodhound than Claude the poodle.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "The Clampetts and the Dodgers" - Jed and Jethro go golfing with Leo Durocher, coach of the Los Angeles Dodgers, who wants to recruit Jethro as a pitcher when he sees how well he can throw.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Jed Pays His Income Tax" - When an IRS agent gets chased away by Granny, Mr. Drysdale tells him the story of how the Clampetts came to be rich and move to Beverly Hills.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies

This beloved western drama ran for 14 seasons on NBC. Created by David Dortort.

programme.title: Billy The Kid Returns
programme.desc: Who would ever mistake Roy Rogers for Billy the Kid? That's exactly what happens in this actionpacked horse opera from Republic Pictures. Rogers arrives on the scene shortly after Pat Garrett (Wade Boteler) kills the infamous Billy the Kid (also played by Rogers). Though Billy was a killer, he was on the side of the homesteaders against a coterie of big time ranchers. As Billy's death is unknown to the public, Roy gets Garrett to let him pose as Billy to continue the fight against the ranchers, but without the bloodshed. We also get six songs, including When the Sun is Setting on the Prairie...

programme.title: Arizona Bound
programme.desc: The Rough Riders are called upon to help save a stagecoach line. From 1941, starring Buck Jones and Tim McCoy, plus Horace Murphy and Luana Walters. Directed by Spencer Bennett.

programme.title: The Hanged Man
programme.desc: After a condemned gunfighter (Steve Forrest) survives his own hanging, he helps a young widow stop a pitiless land baron from taking her ranch. This television feature boasts a strong cast of recognizable characters, including Will Geer, Sharon Acker, Dean Jagger, BarBara Luna, and Cameron Mitchell. Director Michael Caffey would go on to work on such hit shows as Barnaby Jones and MacGyver. Also, look for John Mitchum, younger brother of Robert, in a small role. This movie originally aired on ABC-TV and was considered the pilot for a possible series. Writer/producer Andrew Fenady was behind several opular TV shows such as Branded and The Rebel, as well as the 1970 John Wayne feature, Chisum.

programme.title: The Undefeated
programme.desc: Unaware that the Civil War has ended, Col. John Henry Thomas (John Wayne) successfully attacks a Confederate company led by James Langdon (Rock Hudson). With the remnants of Langdon's squadron fleeing to Mexico, Thomas and his adopted Native American son, Blue Boy (Roman Gabriel), gather a herd of horses and head for the border with their company, to sell them. After Langdon's caravan is captured by a Mexican general (Tony Aguilar), Thomas nobly sacrifices the horses to free them.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: It's Halloween season, and Carla Hall is making her Banana Pudding Trifle in portable mason jars. She skips the traditional Nilla wafers for buttery Chessmen cookies to keep the crunch. The hosts chat about their favorite Halloween costumes, debate the merits of kitchen gadgets, and deal with Michael's impatience over Carla's loud mixer.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: The Halloween celebrations kick off with guest Jeanette Donnarumma, former culinary producer for The Rachael Ray Show. Clinton Kelly attempts a spooky "Cheese Rat" appetizer made from cream cheese, curry powder, and mango chutney. The group laughs at the questionable rat shape, shares TV producer behind-the-scenes stories, and Jeanette shakes up an Apple Cider Margarita spritz.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: It's cozy comfort food season as Michael Symon cooks a hearty Beef and Butternut Squash Stew. While the meat braises, the hosts share their favorite podcasts to listen to while doing chores, universally bash the idea of the "Turducken", and discuss the possibility of a future Chewed Up cookbook.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: It's finally Halloween. Michael dresses up as a giant Minion while Carla Hall makes festive Graveyard Dirt Cups. Using a rich chocolate mousse, crushed cookies, and gummy worms, it's the perfect spooky dessert. The trio debates the merits of candy corn, reminisces about retro sweets, and Michael shares a hilarious story of chasing down an ice cream truck.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Michael Symon whips up crispy homemade tater tots with a rich gruyere fondue dip. While frying the tots, the trio gets delightfully derailed when Michael accidentally misspeaks, leading to uncontrollable laughter. A grumpy Clinton complains about his restless legs, Carla relives a past cooking competition disaster, and the group answers fan mail about holiday crafts. The episode wraps with a fan giveaway.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Clinton Kelly embraces "sweater weather" by making a savory Butternut Squash, Spinach, and Blue Cheese Pie. While he cooks, the hosts discuss expensive clothing habits and the woes of tight pants. A cooking question about pie layers hilariously derails into a conversation about dating terminology, and Michael reveals he is passing the Thanksgiving hosting torch to his son. The episode concludes with Michael giving away a lucky golf putter.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: It's Friday dessert day, and Carla Hall is making a comforting Peach Cobbler Pound Cake mashup. While Carla bakes, Michael Symon annoys Clinton Kelly with a deafening hand mixer. The trio discusses their favorite childhood holiday cookies, passionately debates whether black-and-white cookies are actually good, and shares ideas for crazy food mashups. The episode ends with a giveaway of a custom-designed apron from Carla.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Clinton Kelly dodges cooking duty by bringing in guest Chef Leah Cohen to tackle a fan's fridge. Leah whips up incredible Chicken Lettuce Wraps using ground chicken, hoisin, and leftover rice. The hosts talk Pop-A-Shot basketball, picky kids, and Michael gives away a very meaningful piece of his restaurant history.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Michael Symon takes on the Fan Fridge challenge, cooking from Pat in Peoria's refrigerator. He prepares a beautiful Pan-Roasted Salmon with crispy skin, served alongside a bright Greek-inspired salad of avocado, cucumber, olives, feta, and red curry paste. The crew jokes about Nick's organizing skills and reads fan mail.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Fan Fridge Week wraps up on Friday as Carla Hall transforms leftovers into a decadent Banana Bread French Toast. Using cottage cheese, oat milk, and eggs for a rich custard, she tops the sweet treat with a tart lemonade reduction, fresh berries, and chocolate syrup. The hosts discuss taking the show on the road in a van.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: The hosts celebrate their 25th show milestone with guest Chadwick Boyd, who elevates the classic Green Bean Casserole with caramelized onions, fresh beans, and a gruyere drop biscuit topping. While the casserole bakes, the crew debates mashed potato techniques, and Michael shares a hilarious story about how an AI misread his pan wall photo. A fan wins a Caraway pan set.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: A Fan Fridge rescue mission unfolds when a hypothetical Thanksgiving goes wrong. Michael Symon saves the day using Tammy's fridge ingredients to create a savory skillet of chicken thighs, Italian sausage, and sweet peppers. Meanwhile, the hosts share their current TV binges, Michael explains the meanings behind his tattoos, and Clinton sings "Brandy" for a fan. The episode wraps with a giveaway of Carla's measuring bowls.

programme.title: The Dave Chang Cooking Show
programme.desc: With a New Orleans–inspired menu now set for his friend Bryan Ford, Dave starts testing out this week’s recipes: barbecue turkey legs, meat pies, coconut flatbread, and coconut beignets.

programme.title: The Dave Chang Cooking Show
programme.desc: "Preparing for Bryan Ford" - This week's guest, Bryan Ford, is on his way to the studio. With a coconut-heavy menu now locked in, Dave starts making his three-breads-in-one dough, and gets the turkey necks cooking.

programme.title: The Dave Chang Cooking Show
programme.desc: "Dinner with Bryan Ford" - Our guest this week is Bryan Ford, for whom Dave and Chris Ying have prepared a menu that’s heavy on coconut, devoid of shellfish (Bryan’s allergic), and heavily inspired by New Orleans.

programme.title: Winning Mealtime
programme.desc: Winning Mealtime: Chicken Meatloaf with Creamed Corn and Mashed Potatoes - Chef Keith Corbin joins Chris in the kitchen to put together another easy family-friendly meal: chicken meatloaf with a zesty creamed corn and garlicy, buttery mashed potatoes.

programme.title: Winning Mealtime
programme.desc: Winning Mealtime: Niku Udon; Lemongrass-Caramel Chicken; Stir-Fried Angel Hair Pasta - Chris is in the kitchen to take you through three winning recipes from his rotation: A comforting udon noodle dish with thin slices of beef in a smoky, savory, slightly sweet broth; simple braised/stir-fried chicken that is somewhere between Vietnamese clay pot catfish and Taiwanese Three Cup Chicken; and a go-to quick pasta with tofu and veggies stir-fried in a flavor-packed sauce.

programme.title: Winning Mealtime
programme.desc: Winning Mealtime - Sliders 3-ways, Because Kids Love Small Food: Kids love to eat small foods! It's a fact. Chris Ying shares three different ways he makes miniature burgers for his family, including Dad's Hacky BBQ Pork Char Siu, a ground pork slider and a traditional ground beef slider.

programme.title: Winning Mealtime
programme.desc: Chris Ying cooks three easy breakfasts that you and (hopefully) your kids will love! The first recipe is for a physics-defying Swedish waffle that only has three ingredients (and are unbelieveably light and crispy). Next Chris makes a sticky rice omelette inspired by Nadine Levy Redzepi that is so simple and delicious. Just little chunks of Thai sticky rice fried crisp, then blanketed in egg. Finally Chris makes a family favorite—pork floss pancakes. These are similar to scallion pancakes and one of the best (and hackiest) paths to to Chinese breakfast pastries.

programme.title: Ellie's Real Good Food
programme.desc: Ellie tackles the challenge we all face every day--what's for breakfast, especially in a busy household when everyone is out the door like a pool ball break. She helps out Mary, a mom and an elite athlete and coach, who literally hits the ground running each morning. Recipes include Make-ahead Mini Frittatas with Leeks and Asparagus, Morning Glory Baked Oatmeal, PB and Grapes Wrap, and more.

programme.title: Ellie's Real Good Food
programme.desc: Ellie visits a busy office where stress has led to junk food snacking and fast-food lunching. Armed with photos of sugary office treats submitted by one office employee to solicit her help, Ellie shares tasty alternatives to fight back. Recipes include Herbed Farro Salad with Chicken, Walnuts, Feta and Spinach, Asian Chicken Wrap, and Buffalo Chicken Salad.

programme.title: Ellie's Real Good Food
programme.desc: There's a gluten-free explosion these days, but how much of it is real and how much of it is hype? Ellie demystifies the gluten issue once and for all with the help of her stepbrother and yoga instructor David Wilder, who has celiac disease. In this episode, Ellie also underscores just how many foods are naturally gluten-free, with recipes that will satisfy everyone. Recipes include Multigrain Pancakes, Steak au Poivre Salad, Roasted Salmon & Fennel with Lemon & Thyme, and more.

programme.title: Ellie's Real Good Food
programme.desc: Does sugar have you in its thrall? Ellie helps one family tackle their sugar quandary so they can continue to do the baking they love in a healthier way without sacrificing flavor. Recipes include Crispy French Toast Fingers with Blueberry Maple Sauce, Banana Bread with Chocolate Drizzle, Coconut Date Balls, and Cherry Chocolate Haystacks.

programme.title: Ellie's Real Good Food
programme.desc: It can be a challenge to put dinner together in a working household. And then what happens when you're working opposite shifts? Ellie helps a frazzled couple trying to get healthy weeknight dinners on the table when conflicting schedules and priorities intervene. Recipes include Shrimp with Spinach, Garlic and Smoked Paprika, Peach Chicken with Crispy Bread Crumbs, and Mango-Coconut Sorbet.

programme.title: Ellie's Real Good Food
programme.desc: He's a meat eater. She's a vegetarian. Their kitchen has become a battleground. Can this marriage be saved? It's Ellie to the rescue with flexible recipes that will bring them together. Recipes include Warm Spinach Salad with grilled sirloin, Panzanella with White Beans with chicken sausage, Forbidden Rice Bowl, and Grilled veggies & lamb kabobs served with Tahini Sauce.

programme.title: Ellie's Real Good Food
programme.desc: Ellie helps out a couple contending with the challenges of cooking in a tiny apartment kitchen. She proves that with just a few pans and gadgets and some smart recipes, anyone can produce fantastic meals in even the most cramped quarters. Recipes include Herbed Salmon & Orzo Casserole with Feta, Beef & Vegetable Stew, Lemon Garlic Turkey Breast with Rosemary Potatoes & Brussels Sprouts, and more.

programme.title: Ellie's Real Good Food
programme.desc: Ellie prepares an ensemble of make-ahead dishes that are designed so that both party-giver and partygoers can equally enjoy the festivities. These dishes can be cooked and frozen ahead of time and then reheated at party time. Go ahead: enjoy your own party. Recipes include Asian Shrimp Cakes served with Avocado-Wasabi Sauce, Chicken Phyllo Pies, Broccoli & Sun-Dried Tomato Flatbread, and more.

programme.title: Ellie's Real Good Food
programme.desc: Ellie shows us how to transform a vacation from an unhealthy free-for-all into an opportunity to find new flavors you can use to bring your good times home. Recipes include Curried Chickpea Wraps (Roti), Jerk Pork Loin with Mango Cucumber Salsa, Grilled Pineapple with Coconut Whip, and mango-avocado salad.

programme.title: Lidia's Kitchen
programme.desc: Lidia believes in cooking according to season, and when springtime comes, she and her family all work together to create a beautiful garden. In this episode, she shares four recipes that celebrate the bounty of the summertime garden: Tuna Salad with Boiled Zucchini, String Bean Salad with Capers and Basil, Whole Wheat Couscous with Cucumbers, and finally Shells with Chicken and Zucchini.

programme.title: Lidia's Kitchen
programme.desc: Lidia creates a Tomato and Mint Salad, Tomato and Ricotta Crostini, and Spaghetti with Quick Pantry Sauce, before finishing with a Gluttonous Tomato - a perfect appetizer or lunch dish.

programme.title: Lidia's Kitchen
programme.desc: Are you always in a rush to prepare something quick yet delicious for dinnertime? Lidia shares three of her favorite quick and simple meal ideas, all of which can work as an appetizer, a lunch or a quick dinner. They include: Scallops, Scallion and Mushrooms; Chicken Breasts with Orange and Gaeta Olives; Tuna with Mimosa Sauce.

programme.title: Lidia's Kitchen
programme.desc: Garlic and Onions appear in many Italian dishes, and in this episode they actually become the "star ingredients." Lidia starts the meal with a quick and easy Savory Onion Tart followed by a delicious, mild and creamy Garlic Risotto. For dessert, it's all about chocolate with the moist Torta Caprese.

programme.title: Lidia's Kitchen
programme.desc: There is nothing more delicious than butterflied poultry with super crispy chicken. In this episode, Lidia starts with a Spicy Butterflied Cornish Hen made with hot cherry peppers, rosemary and wine. She then pulls out the beer to add to her Potatoes Baked in Beer. Our favorite Grandma Erminia joins Lidia to taste the Squash and Ricotta Tart.

programme.title: Lidia's Kitchen
programme.desc: It's all about family in this episode as Lidia shares three of her favorite family recipes. Marinated Meatballs, Zucchini Parmigiana, Artichoke Carbonara and Jam Filled Mezzaluna are the stars of this episode.

programme.title: Today's Homeowner with Danny Lipford
programme.desc: While the 1950s era metal cabinets in this home served well over the years, the homeowners decided it was time for a change. The existing kitchen was taken down to the studs, then given a more classic look that blended with the historic home.

programme.title: Today's Homeowner with Danny Lipford
programme.desc: To celebrate our 300th episode of the Today’s Homeowner with Danny Lipford TV show, we’re taking a behind the scenes look at some of the highlights and bloopers from our 12 years of bringing you the best in home improvement information.

programme.title: Today's Homeowner with Danny Lipford
programme.desc: You’ve seen them advertised on TV and featured in infomercials, but do they really live up to the hype in the ads? I put some of the products to the test recently to see if they performed as claimed.

programme.title: Today's Homeowner with Danny Lipford
programme.desc: We've remodeled a lot of kitchens over the years, and often wondered how well the designs, ideas, and materials the homeowners chose worked out. To find out, we decided to revisit three kitchen remodels to see how well they worked out.

programme.title: Today's Homeowner with Danny Lipford
programme.desc: Today's Homeowner is on the road in New Hampshire to lend a helping hand to the winners of the “Win Danny and His Crew for a Day” sweepstakes, sponsored by John Deere, we're taking on the homeowners’ to-do list around their house and yard.

programme.title: Today's Homeowner with Danny Lipford
programme.desc: Owning a home represents the largest investment for most families, so it only makes sense help your investment grow.

programme.title: Today's Homeowner with Danny Lipford
programme.desc: Every member of your household should be safe and comfortable, and that includes your pets.

programme.title: Today's Homeowner with Danny Lipford
programme.desc: We are at the home of the winner of the Today’s Dream Kitchen Contest, sponsored by Merillat cabinets. The winner received a complete kitchen makeover including new cabinets, countertops, flooring, lighting, and even a new kitchen door!

programme.title: Today's Homeowner with Danny Lipford
programme.desc: In the first of our series on The Kuppersmith Project, we’ll tour the 1926, Tudor style home before our extensive renovation begins, and show you the plans we have in store to turn it into a house any family would love to call home.

programme.title: Today's Homeowner with Danny Lipford
programme.desc: We’re tackling the demolition work along with building a solid foundation in our extensive renovation of a 1926 home. After our remodeling is complete, the house will have been transformed into a beautiful and practical home.

programme.title: Today's Homeowner with Danny Lipford
programme.desc: With the demolition and foundation work out of the way on the Kuppersmith Project, we’re finally ready to start building the addition and renovating the existing exterior to turn our 1926 house into a practical home any family would love to own.

programme.title: Today's Homeowner with Danny Lipford
programme.desc: With the additions to our 1926 Kuppersmith Project house framed up and the roofing on, the next big step was roughing in all the plumbing, wiring, and ductwork so we can get started installing the insulation and drywall in the house.

programme.title: Today's Homeowner with Danny Lipford
programme.desc: Next up in our extensive renovation of the 1926 Kuppersmith Project house, we installed foam insulation in the walls and attic, hung drywall, painted the exterior, and began installing the kitchen cabinets.

programme.title: Today's Homeowner with Danny Lipford
programme.desc: The interior of the Kuppersmith Project house is taking shape as the cabinetry, moldings, and heart pine flooring are installed. Plus, we take sneak peak at the finished décor from designer Joe Boehm of Better Homes & Gardens magazine.

programme.title: Today's Homeowner with Danny Lipford
programme.desc: We’re grading the lot and preparing for the driveway on the outside of the Kuppersmith Project house renovation. Meanwhile on the inside, we’re focused on installing the granite and quartz countertops in the kitchen and master bath.

programme.title: 10 Little Dinosaurs - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: 10 Stegosauruses! 10 Triceratopses! 10 Pterodactyls! 10 Brontosauruses! And 10 Tyrannosaurus Rex! Wow! This Super Simple counting song introduces the numbers 1-10 and also some very cool dinosaur names! Can you say them all?!

programme.title: Steve's Street Sweeper - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Steve the Street Sweeper is cleaning the street when garbage splatters all over the side of his truck! He doesn't want a dirty truck, so Steve races to Carl’s Car Wash! With a quick mess assessment and a few twists of some knobs, Carl’s suds-sational car wash is ready to give Steve's vehicle a good scrub-a-dub! Steve leaves one happy customer, and is ready to get back to sweeping rubbish.

programme.title: Down By The Bay - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Did you ever see cat wearing a hat? How about a goat rowing a boat? Well you can in this video for the classic children’s song, Down By The Bay!

programme.title: Mr. Pig & Mr. Mouse Have A Mess On Their Hands - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Mr. Mouse and Mr. Pig love making food and having their friends over to eat it. But afterwards, their house is a complete mess! Mr. Monkey has a tasty idea! What is it? Watch and find out!

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: When a girl named Alani notices that the sea level is rising around the island of Tuvalu she orders a huge lifeboat for all the people in her village to ride on. Jett finds himself stuck in ice in Antarctica courtesy of Golden Boy, Golden Wheels, and a giant Golden Robot. He is rescued by World Aircraft and learns that Golden Boy has caused lots of global warming problems around the planet.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: A passenger airplane bound for Italy has to make an emergency landing on World Aircraft. When Lime offers to prepare a meal for the passengers, Mano, a young boy passenger, makes a popular suggestion: pizza! Ratu and his Dad are excited about a "survival challenge" on one of Fiji's Desert Islands, but they forgot to bring their survival guide to teach them how to filter water!

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett delivers flowery mooncakes to Meilin, a young girl who wants to celebrate the Mid-Autumn Festival by leaving a gift for the Moon Lady, who is said to descend from the moon according to Chinese folklore. A girl named Emma lives in Transinne, Belgium and she asks the Super Wings if they can help her with her solar system school project.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett, Astra and Rover continue to help Emma, her Dad, and spaceship Rick see the solar system. Trouble is Golden Boy and Golden Wheels tag along! Jett delivers a claw grabber to Marcia, a little girl playing a treasure hunt game in which she searches for hidden treasure notes in the Rio Abiseo National Park in Peru. Our Super Wing helps her in her search!

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: The Super Pets encounter three pandas on a country road in Chengdu, China. They try to help get the pandas off the highway and back to the panda centre. A girl asks the Super Wings for help in locating a dolphin in the waters off Iceland. Jett and Paul deliver a sonar device that can track dolphin whistles.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: When a princess's dogs need to attend training school she worries that they're too playful to pass. Jett and Donnie deliver some special training suits to help them succeed. When the Super Pets accidentally knock down a birthday piñata at a house outside of Mexico City, Jett and Jerome deliver a huge piñata replacement for the boy's party.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: The Super Pets visit Pisa, Italy where some street cats have made a mess spilling recycling bins. Jett and a new Super Wing called Shine deliver tongs and help with the clean up. The Super Pets are in Pohang, South Korea where they meet a girl whose robot is in need of repairs. Jett and Jerome deliver a much needed repair kit and some robot dance lessons!

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: The Super Pets meet a boy in the Serengeti National Park whose ball rolls into an ostrich nest. The mother ostrich thinks the ball is one of her eggs and won't give it back. When a hippo gets stuck on a waterslide at a community swimming pool in Kenya, a boy calls on the Super Wings to deliver a hippo-sized life ring to help free it.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett delivers winter clothes to a little girl living in Egypt's Sahara Desert where a cold snap has left the desert snowy. Jett and Astra show her how to enjoy the snow. After the Super Pets accidentally knock down some Turkish rugs in an Istanbul market, Jett and Ellie deliver a magic lamp that can summon two genies.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: A boy, Kima, and his Dad are trekking through the Himalaya mountains in Nepal. The Super Wings bring an LED torch to help them. Trouble strikes when a baby yeti startles them. Vo, the Mars rover, is celebrating his birthday but misses his friend Catalina. Jett and Astra come to the rescue and promise to bring Catalina and her ginormous gift to Mars.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: For Children's Day, Wang Min's Dad has invited his son and his classmates to visit his toy factory. While cleaning up before the visit, a robot toy goes on a rampage. The Super Pets encounter an itchy lion at a sanctuary in South Africa. Jett and Astra deliver a back scratcher, but the lion's itchiness is stronger than they realized!

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: The Super Pets go into a video game arcade and play a video game called Dessert Kingdom. They are watched by a boy named Yoonho and they decide to go into the game itself. When the Super Pets unearth a woolly mammoth, a Nenets boy wants to keep it. The mammoth must be able to pull a sleigh so Jett and Dizzy deliver a mammoth size sleigh.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: When a T-Rex skeleton on display in a Copenhagen museum is brought to life, a boy orders a remote controller to summon a giant robot T-Rex that he built to help calm it. Jett and the others arrive in the Jurassic Period to return Tyranno to her proper place in time. A volcano erupts throwing fireballs everywhere and causing a dinosaur stampede.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: The Super Pets spend a day at a Pet Hotel in Dubai, United Arab Emirates. The daughter of the hotel owner gets help from the Super Wings to keep them well behaved. After the Jet Pets' Mini Base collides with a small comet, Jett and Astra rush a space scanner to a young boy and together and the three search space for the small 'Baba' comet.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: It's Jett's birthday and almost all of his friends are throwing him a big birthday party! Sky sends Donnie, Paul, and Dizzy out on missions and nobody is left at Jett's party. When the truck transporting race cars gets lost, Jett, Jerome and Dizzy show up in Monza, Italy to take part in a very special Super Wings race against Golden Boy.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: While in Thailand, Jett Pet and Paul Pet's fruit is swiped by a monkey. Thanawat asks for help getting his toys back so they create an LED ball with a tracking system. The Super Pets travel to Madrid, Spain where they help a boy secure a case for his pet tarantula to ride the train. However an accident causes his tarantula to become super-sized!

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: After eating Super Pets' trick chocolates, Jett can only move very slowly. An emergency call comes in from a young girl in Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia, who needs an ice maker delivered. When the Super Pets discover an erupting underwater volcano, a girl orders a megaphone to alert all the villagers fishing in the water. However, they don't listen to her warnings.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: The Super Pets are on World Aircraft to help Jett give some kids a tour. After Storm demonstrates how the package printer works, two packages get mixed up. The Super Pets travel to Tokyo, Japan where they help the Paper Rangers repair an Origami Robot for an action movie. Afterward, they get asked to be ACTORS in the movie!

programme.title: Baby Einstein New Classics
programme.desc: Learn all about music and rhythm in the world around us! Discover classical music and learn instrument names through narration and repetition. Inspire sweet dreams with gentle melodies and a comforting bedtime story. Learn about classical music from Beethoven, Bach, and Mozart. Sing and dance along to classic rhythmic songs like The Wheels on the Bus and see real-life images of instruments.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Ocean Explorers
programme.desc: Cal, Neptune, Opus, Dean, Tinker and others learn about the flora and fauna of the ocean through STEAM-based principles and real-life footage.

programme.title: Cal's Sound Yard
programme.desc: Cal's Sound Yard is a new animated series from Baby Einstein that introduces the letters of the alphabet and the sounds they make. Why all the tracing and repetition? And why are the letters out of order? Don't worry! There's a reason for all that; the content is based on "The Einstein Way" - a curiosity-driven learning philosophy, from industry experts, inspired by Montessori and STEAM.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: Share a rainbow of sights and sounds with your baby as you discover the wonders of color together! Join puppet host "Vincent Van Goat" as he creates six Van Gogh masterpieces exploring red, green, blue, yellow, orange, and purple. World Of Colors is a spirited celebration of creative expression.

programme.title: Baby Einstein New Classics
programme.desc: Meet fascinating creatures from across the globe and learn to run, hop, and crawl like your favorite animal friends. Dance and sing along to discover animal names and the native habitats of the world's most unique creatures. See real-life images of lions and zebras on the African savannah, then learn animal names through repetition and narration, or simply watch your favorite animals play!

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: As their communication skills continue to develop, little ones begin to recognize common words and may point to objects or pictures when these items are named. Baby Wordsworth playfully taps into your little one's natural curiosity and introduces 30 words from around the home -- both spoken and in sign language. This engaging program presents little ones with familiar objects in the kitchen, playroom, yard and more -- from the living room window to their favorite teddy bear.

programme.title: Baby Einstein New Classics
programme.desc: Discover the wonderful world of water and deep dive into all the amazing creatures that call the ocean home. Learn simple words about the sea like water, coral reef, and ocean through narration and repetition. Engaging live-action footage of your favorite ocean friends and classical melodies will dazzle your little explorer as they experience the magical world under the sea.

programme.title: Baby Einstein New Classics
programme.desc: Isn't the world exciting?! Learn about things found in nature like flowers, grass, trees, and leaves with real-life footage and narration. Sing-along to popular nursery rhymes and learn about common bedtime themes. Teach baby how to say words like eat, milk, and all done verbally and through sign language. Discover words and activities about playtime and friendship.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: Within the first year of babies' lives, their physical development begins to kick into high gear as they explore ways to physically interact with the world around them. BABY'S FIRST MOVES is a joyful celebration of their movement milestones -- including first steps, clapping, jumping, dancing and more.

programme.title: Baby Einstein New Classics
programme.desc: Meet fascinating animals from across the globe! Dance and sing along with puppets and discover some of the world's most unique creatures. Join us to dance along to classical melodies as we learn animal names through narration and repetition or simply enjoy seeing live-action footage.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: With the Dolittle, and other Baby programs under their belts, the tots who follow Julie Aigner-Clark's Baby Einstein series will sidle up to Baby Newton expecting a similar exploration of building blocks to brilliance, but this time there's a wrinkle or two. Animation makes its first appearance, and parents steeped in keep-it-simple culture may object to the springy "I Know My Shapes" song, a departure from classical-only video predecessors.

programme.title: Baby Einstein New Classics
programme.desc: Enjoy the best of summer, autumn and winter with Baby Einstein! Discover the familiar sights and sounds of the different seasons. Learn names of common objects associated with each through repetition and narration and see engaging images of whimsical toys that celebrate each. Discover the magic of each season from falling leaves, rolling beach balls and even snowmen.

programme.title: Baby Einstein New Classics
programme.desc: Meet Cats, Dogs, Birds, Bugs and Woodland Creatures! Learn simple words through narration and repetition. Meet all sorts of creatures from domestic kittens to jungle cats, puppies, big and small birds, butterflies, lady bugs, otters and deer!! See whimsical toys and puppets.

programme.title: Baby Shark & More Kids Songs by Bob The Train
programme.desc: Let's dance to the Baby Shark song!! Come join Bob the train in his preschool nursery rhymes & kids songs for babies & toddlers like balloon song, no no song, five little babies, bath song, this is the way, rain rain go away, incy wincy spider, johny johny, humpty dumpty, rig a jig jig, zoo song, wheels on the bus, pat a cake, ten in the bed, three little kittens, and more baby songs.

programme.title: Popular Nursery Rhymes and Kids Songs - Little Treehouse
programme.desc: Welcome to the mystical land of the Little Treehouse! where you are taken on a magical nursery rhymes journey. Kids will laugh, dance, sing, and play along with our video, learning kids songs like no no song, wheels on the bus, this is the way, row row row your boat and much, much more while enjoying our friendly characters.

programme.title: Alphabet, Phonics, & More Kids Songs
programme.desc: Alphabet Phonics, Numbers, Colors and Shapes! Learning made so much fun and easy with Junior Squad!

programme.title: Zoo Song & More Baby Songs - Junior Squad
programme.desc: Enjoy Junior Squad's "Zoo Song" and popular easy to learn nursery rhymes for babies and toddlers that the children love to sing and dance along with. Learn these kids songs and new words at the same time.

programme.title: Twinkle Twinkle Little Star & More Kids Rhymes
programme.desc: Enjoy Twinkle Twinkle Little Star's Nursery Rhyme with Farmees and many more songs!

programme.title: Road Rangers Kids Show
programme.desc: A garbage truck, ambulance, police car, fire engine and tow truck start working together and form the super hero gang for kids Road Rangers to protect their car cartoon city. In this kids show collection of transportation cartoon adventure stories and educational videos children & toddlers will learn shapes, colors, abc's, numbers and more.

programme.title: Luke & Lily Non Stop
programme.desc: Luke & Lily non-stop playlist with fun & kids Song videos,Children will watch and learn our other popular & kids friendly songs like London Bridge, Incy Wincy Spider, Pat a Cake, Miss Polly Had a Dolly, Ten In the Bed and more cartoon rhymes and songs for babies.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: The sinister Robotnik blackmails Cyrus, an old friend of Sonic's, by holding his father hostage.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: Rumor has it that Queen Aleena's journals are buried in the city of Tashistan. Sonic and his siblings search the city for the scrolls.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: While lost in the wastelands of Mobius, Sonic, Manic and Sonia stumble upon an oasis called Lake Valley Resort.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: Sonia is invited to a debutante ball, but before she can be officially announced to society, she and her brothers, Manic and Sonic have an important mission.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: The Hedgehogs find out that Sonia has inherited a castle. She basks in the idea of having a castle for headquarters.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: The Hedgehogs steal historical artifacts of Mobuis from Robotnik before he can pawn them off at an auction.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: A group of Freedom Fighters is obliterated by a swarm of metallic fly-bots. When Manic goes looking for the insects, he is stung with serum.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: Sleet and Dingo plan to collect the taxes owed to Robotnik from the Duke of Velcronia but keep it for themselves.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Momma escapes again from the Mobius Home for Really Bizarre People, disowns Robotnik for failing to capture Sonic, then with the help of an obscure Mobius law, adopts Sonic!

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: When S and G rocket to outerspace to mine a radioactive mineral from asteroids, Sonic and Tails stow away. Through a blunder by the robots, all are stranded in space, and Robotnik tries to blow all of them out of the stars.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: When a Rebel Base is threatened by Robotnik, Sonic and Tails team up with Big Mike and Da Bears to run a booby-trapped gauntlet in their gigantic Road Warrior-like truck.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Robotnik pretends to retire, and lures Sonic and Tails into a phony vacation resort, laden with booby-traps set by Scratch and Grounder. But Sonic takes the bungee jumping, hang gliding, and skydiving in stride, and gives the bashes the bots.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Brandon Quark, an evil half-man, half-duck genius challenges, then teams up with Robotnik to capture Sonic. But Sonic knows their weakness, and pits the Badnik geniuses against one another, and sets himself free.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Sonic plays Cyrano to bring Robotnik Jr. and Breezie together. The problem is, Breezie's crazy about Sonic. So Sonic gets out of the way, but when he does, Junior is captured by Robotnik, and Breezie comes to the rescue, finally falling for him.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: When Tails invents a Hover-Hanglider for Sonic's birthday, Sonic suggests he assist Prof. Von Schlemmer with his new Robotnik-Nabber machine. Robotnik hears about this, and poses as Von Schlemmer to trick Tails into inventing a Sonic-Nabber instead.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: A female space hunter named Katella, who is capturing animals all over Mobius for a Zoo, teams up with Robotnik and captures Sonic. To Robotnik's great fear, she then plans to marry the eggman!

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Everyone is frightened because some visiting birds keep trying to sit on their heads. According to Chirpee, the birds just enjoy sitting on people's heads. Rainbow Ruby designs hats where the birds can comfortably sit without disturbing the villagers. // The village friends were planning to have some fun with the rainbow fish but they're all disappointed to discover that the lake has frozen over.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: The friends are very tired because Mr. Moon hasn't come to sing them their nightly lullaby. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become an Astronaut and flies to space to look for Mr. Moon with her friends. // In Rainbow Village, a super frantic Thunderbell is high up in the air, trapped inside a giant bubble. Thunderbell got trapped in a giant bubble in the middle of a bubble bath. In order to find out a way to bring Thunderbell back to earth, Rainbow Ruby turns into a scientist.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Gina accidentally broke Felicia's house, leaving Felicia homeless. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become an architect and builds a house that suits Felicia's demands. // Gina is extremely worried. She needs strawberries for the Rainbow Fruit Ice Cream Festival that's starting soon but the strawberries are all mixed in with other red objects.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Ling Ling takes Rainbow Ruby to Ellie's cabin where she meets mischievous baby stars that fell from the sky. The baby stars were playing together, got separated from their mother and ended up in Rainbow Village. // Kiki is extremely upset because the jewel Prince Frederick gave her as a gift broke. The friends try to glue the broken pieces together but it doesn't work. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become a jewelry designer and tries designing jewelry with the broken pieces.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: When Ruby and Choco arrive at the village, they find a very worried looking Ling Ling. Gina, Ellie, and Thunderbell went camping in Rainbow Forest but they saw a monster in the forest, got scared and had to run away. // Ruby is struggling to make a doll with her dad. Ruby and Choco get their suitcase and as Ruby swings her umbrella, there they are, in front of Rainbow fountain. Mayor Ling Ling tells her that today is the day of Princess Kiki's ballet performance.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Ruby is looking at shoes that are now too small for her but she is unwilling to throw away. Ling Ling is worried about Thunderbell. His scooter broke so he is not able to carry out his work as a mail carrier. // Gina calls Rainbow Ruby because today is the day to show their appreciation to Mayor Ling Ling. It took a long time for the village friends to prepare an amazing painting for the mayor. Unfortunately, Thunderbell accidentally destroyed the painting while delivering it.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: There is a new menu at the restaurant, which is very popular. There is a long line in front of the restaurant but there weren't enough staff members to serve the villagers the food. Rainbow Ruby turns into a waitress using her magic suitcase and serve tables kindly. // Rainbow Village is full of marbles. The marbles that Rainbow Ruby spilled in her room poured down into the village from up above the sky! Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to transform into a paramedic.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Gina, Thunderbell, and Choco try to cheer Jessy up but their efforts are of no use. While talking to Mayor Ling Ling, Rainbow Ruby realizes that today is the day that Jessy first arrived in Rainbow Village! Jessy was upset that her friends forgot such a meaningful day to her. // Ling Ling has caught a bad cold and was sneezing all over the place. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase and transforms into a doctor and cares for him.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Ling Ling is worried that the villagers are all in low spirits. Ruby thinks of fun games to play but the villagers say that they have already played all of the games too many times. Rainbow Ruby transforms into a singer. // Ling Ling is worried because of the "Secret Present Swapping Party" that Thunderbell is preparing. Thunderbell forgot to send out the invitations. Rainbow Ruby turns into a mail carrier and delivers the invitations.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Ling Ling tells Rainbow Ruby that a Rainbow Ball Tournament is about to start soon but he is worried because the field is covered with pokey pods. Thunderbell, Ellie, and Gina are trying to pick them up and clear the field but it is not easy since the pokey pods are so spikey. // Ling Ling tells Rainbow Ruby that he lost his glasses. Then Ellie tells her she lost her needles, Gina her hat, and Thunderbell his wheels. Who could have taken away all these things?

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Ling Ling is waiting for Rainbow Ruby, looking worried. It turns out that Mr. Sloth's best friend Chirpee is depressed. Chirpee wants to fly high but is struggling due to his small wings and lack of means to learn how to fly. // Ling Ling tells Rainbow Ruby that the dress that the paper doll Paige was planning to wear to Kiki's dance party is torn. Paige very much wants to go to the party but she cannot go without a dress.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: In Rainbow Village, people are busy preparing for a dance marathon, a competition in which all of the villagers participate. Ling Ling is very sad that Ellie decided not to participate. Ellie is not a confident dancer so she doesn't want to participate. // Rainbow Ruby's friends tell her that they are now friends with Felicia. They were playing hide and seek but Felicia is such a good hider that she's refused to come out even though she's won the game.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Kiki wants to become a movie actress but the villagers have no idea how to direct a movie. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to turn into a movie director. She then assigns roles to the village friends. // Ling Ling rushes toward Rainbow Ruby to tell her that a busy villager mom asked him to take care of her three children but he just doesn't have time to look after them. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to transform into a babysitter and starts babysitting the children.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Princess Kiki is asleep, UP IN THE AIR! According to the note that Kiki left behind, a princess falls under a spell from time to time and in order to break it, they need to play the music box nearby Kiki. But the music box is broken. // Rainbow Ruby and Choco discover cars moving in every direction. Ling Ling asks Rainbow Ruby for help and she uses her magic suitcase to become a police officer.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Ling Ling tells Rainbow Ruby that Rainbow Village friends were playing around the Rainbow fountain to cool off from the heat but water suddenly stopped coming out of the fountain. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become a plumber and starts fixing the fountain. // Kiki's face has turned purple because she ate magical Plumen berries. Kiki accidentally picked magical Plumen berries instead of the delicious rainbow berries she was trying to gather.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Ellie's and Jessy's hair are a complete mess after Felicia accidentally causes some Rainbow fruit to fall on them. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become a hairdresser. // It's winter in Rainbow Village. Ling Ling tells Rainbow Ruby that last night a huge ice mountain appeared so everyone is enjoying an ice sculpture festival. But Jessy seems to have a toothache.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Strawberry is really touched when her girlfriends and the Berrykins volunteer to help her with the construction of her new marketplace, so when the girls suggest they take charge of designing Strawberry's dream-bedroom to go on the second story, of course Strawberry agrees. While construction is going on, the girls each show Strawberry their individual ideas for the bedroom.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: With time running out before the Grand Opening celebration for the new Marketplace, Strawberry's friends get the idea to invite her favorite singer, superstar CHERRY JAM, to be the guest singer. The girls are blown away when their berryjuice cell phone gets a text message that Cherry accepts their invitation! Strawberry is touched by their surprise, but reminds them that now the town and Marketplace really have to shine!

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Cherry Jam is so enjoying staying in Berry Bitty City, that she calls her managers in Big Bitty City and informs them that she is going to stay for a much needed vacation! Strawberry and the girls are thrilled that she will be with them for a little longer, and they do all they can to make their guest comfortable. But Cherry doesn't want to be treated like a guest; she wants to fit in and contribute to the community.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Berry Bitty City is holding its first city-wide talent show! Hearing that it's the music students of superstar Cherry Jam, a talent scout from Big Bitty City plans to show up. Strawberry and her friends excitedly anticipate her arrival.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Raspberry is discovered by a talent scout who wants her to move to Berry Big City and design a new line of Glitter fashions! She will be provided with her own studio, staff, publicity, commitments from big department stores-everything she needs to be a big fashion designing star! All her friends are thrilled for her. Only Cherry is a bit less enthusiastic about Raspberry's stardom, which Raspberry mistakenly interprets as jealousy.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: With the summer almost over, Blueberry overhears Strawberry talking about a wonderful tropical island and believes her friend is going to surprise them all with a much needed vacation! Blueberry makes the other girls promise to keep the secret until Strawberry reveals the big surprise. Of course, even though they've promised to keep the secret, they can't help but try and suss out what the island's like from every little thing Strawberry does.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: It's the last week of summer and Berry Bitty City is hopping with activity as the girls prepare for their tropical island vacation at Berry Breezy Bay Resort. But just as they're about to leave, bad news: the resort is closed for the season due to berry breezy weather. The girls are disappointed, but Orange isn't giving up. She says if they can't go to the tropical island, maybe they can bring the tropical island here!

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: With only a few days of summer left, the girls are about to enjoy their first vacation in their newly-created, tropical beach resort at Berry Bitty Lake, when who should descend upon them but Mavis Maraschino, the comically over-the-top "Entertainment Tonight"-style show host. Mavis has dumped her focus on fashions in favor of an even glitzier show called Lifestyles of the Berry Big Bitty Stars, and she wants her first segment to be about how pop superstar Cherry Jam spends her vacation.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: The Baby Berrykins are enthralled by a fairytale that Blueberry reads to them for Story Time. Charmed by their reaction, Strawberry suggests that the girls do a "berrytale play" for the kids, sort of a "Story Time On Stage." Plum volunteers to direct it. She envisions a small, simple production-until she hears about a gigantic production of "Snowberry and the Seven Berrykins" that's a smash hit in Berry Big City.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Blueberry is disappointed in the girls' lack of enthusiasm for the Patti Persimmon mystery novels, her favorite book series. She finds herself missing the company of her fellow Persimmon fan Huckleberry, and thinks up a great way to get him to visit. She invites Huck to co-write a story with her to submit to an online mystery magazine.. Huck eagerly accepts and comes for a visit.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake (Classic)
programme.desc: Strawberry and her friends are getting the band back together to perform at a local festival, but Ginger Snap is out of town.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake (Classic)
programme.desc: It's a retelling of L. Frank Baum's classic "Wonderful Wizard of Oz" - told from Pupcake's point of view. When a cyclone blows Strawberry to the strange Land of Oz, she runs afoul of a Wicked Witch and must journey to the Emerald City, to ask the Wizard for help in getting home.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Strawberry's world-traveling cousin Apple Dumplin' stops at Berry Bitty City. What starts as a brief visit becomes a series of comical misadventures that ends with Apple finding a new home with Strawberry and her friends.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake (Classic)
programme.desc: Strawberry and her friends love to dance - and the Peculiar Purple Pieman of Porcupine Peak is taking advantage of that!

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake (Classic)
programme.desc: Strawberry Shortcake has always dreamed of seeing a certain rare flower, which only blooms once every ten years - and then only for a day!

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake (Classic)
programme.desc: When Strawberry gets an urgent plea to return to Oz, she finds that there's an environmental disaster.

programme.title: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: When Sarah accidentally spills red paint into the blue paint, a mess turns into a perfectly purple day. The kids use this opportunity to explore the creation of different colors by mixing them together. Inspired by this delightful turn of events, Barney and the kids organize a surprise party for Colleen, entirely centered around her most beloved color: purple.

programme.title: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Excitedly recounting her recent sleepover, Beth shares the fun moments she had with her friends at night. After the kids wish to see nighttime, so Barney uses this opportunity to transform the park, and explain the differences between day and night!

programme.title: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Stumbling upon Mr. Boyd and Bingo repairing a player piano, Barney recognizes a wonderful chance for learning and exploration with the kids. Excitedly, the children engage in playful games, immersing themselves in the delightful sounds of real pianos and even play a few notes themselves. Through this experience, they gain great knowledge about the piano, all with the guidance and encouragement of Barney and their newfound curiosity.

programme.title: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Together, the kids use their creativity to create a drawing depicting Barney and themselves having a blast playing baseball. After playing a game of imaginary baseball, they bring Barney into the fun. After accidentally hurting BJ's feelings by forgetting to add him to the drawing, Barney and the children learn what it takes to be a good friend. BJ realizes he has many friends and enjoys a day playing with Barney and the children.

programme.title: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Barney and the kids explore the wonderful world of counting by playing a variety of fun games, like Barney may I? Barney and the kids help Baby Bop learn how to count to 10 by including her in games, and by taking her on a make-believe shopping trip in the caboose.

programme.title: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Barney helps Baby Bop and the children discover big and little things in the world around them. When Nick expresses his concern about being the smallest among the kids, Barney steps in to demonstrate how each person's unique size holds its own usefulness. When the group heads out to the park, they begin a creative retelling of Jack and the Beanstalk. Barney and his friends discover everyone is special, regardless of size.

programme.title: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: The children are excited to show Barney all the international flags they are hanging throughout the Caboose, in preparation for the International Fair in the playground later that day. The children learn all about many different countries, including Brazil and Kenya. They learn about the clothing worn by local people, the fascinating animals that live in each land and they also partake in various activities they might join in other countries around the world.

programme.title: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: A make-believe neighborhood in the caboose prompts Barney to teach the kids all about different community helpers. The kids explore all the different roles people have in the community that help them live safely and happily, including doctors, police officers, and teachers. The kids realize its great to celebrate the different ways people help others!

programme.title: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Nick announces to the group that he has a workbook assignment for school to fill out, which involves finding as many squares as he can around the park. Barney decided this is a great opportunity for him and the other kids to join in, and its great fun when Barney and the kids can help a friend!

programme.title: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Barney and the children have fun playing with toy cars. They take this opportunity to learn about buses and cars, including all the mechanics inside that make them similar. After learning about different kinds of vehicles they may see on the roads, the kids build a bus to take them to their favorite neighborhood spots.

programme.title: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: When Nick accidentally gets white paint on Sarahs picture, the children must find a way to deal with their emotions. Barney helps his young friends find good ways to express and deal with angry and negative emotions.

programme.title: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: After an abundance of mail arrives at the Caboose for Barney, the kids realize it must be a very special day. Its Barneys birthday! Barneys friends along with Baby Bop and BJ, put together a stupendous party celebration for him in the park, including decorations and cake galore!

programme.title: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Barney, BJ and the kids spend the day preparing for a very special performance for their friends in the park. They all gather in the caboose to prepare for a stupendous night of singing, dancing, and magical fun.

programme.title: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Barney helps his friends put together a Caboose Color Collection which showcases the primary colorsred, yellow and blue. This activity sparks Barney and the kids' imagination, and along with Baby Bop, they realize just how colorful the world can be!

programme.title: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: The children are amazed to find out that playing games and having fun in the park is a great way to exercise. When the rain starts to fall, they use their imagination to come up with clever ways to stay active and have fun indoors.
